title: Moody's (MCO) Unveils a Partnership in Vietnam VIS Rating
text: With an aim to expand further globally, Moody's (MCO) announces the formation of VIS Rating, a partnership with leading financial institutions in Vietnam.

title: Moody's Launches VIS Rating in Partnership with Vietnam's Leading Financial institutions
text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Moody's Corporation (NYSE:MCO) today announced the launch of Vietnam Investors Service And Credit Rating Agency Joint Stock Company (VIS Rating), a partnership between Moody's and leading Vietnamese financial institutions that was initiated by the Vietnam Bond Market Association (VBMA). Vietnam's Ministry of Finance issued a credit rating agency license to VIS Rating on September 18, 2023. VIS Rating will provide independent, best-in-class credit rating services to do.

title: Moody's (MCO) Rides on Strategic Acquisitions Amid Cost Woes
text: Focus on diversifying revenue base and inorganic expansion initiatives are likely to support Moody's (MCO). However, rising expenses and intense competition are headwinds.

title: Moody's Appoints Richard Steele as General Counsel
text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Moody's Corporation (NYSE:MCO) announced today that it has appointed Richard Steele as Senior Vice President and General Counsel, effective September 5, 2023. Mr. Steele will oversee Moody's global Legal and Compliance functions, and has joined the company's Executive Leadership Team. He succeeds John Goggins, who is retiring after over 24 years with the company. Mr. Steele joined Moody's KMV in 2006 as Chief Legal Officer, and was named General Counsel of Moody's Ana.

title: 25% of Warren Buffett's Portfolio Is Invested in These 10 Boring Stocks
text: Buffett's "boring" stocks include financial services and consumer goods leaders as well as Japanese conglomerates. The legendary investor has always preferred businesses that he understands.
